title: 7 teas to help office workers manage neck pain
description: Valeriana officinalis teas may help alleviate neck pain due to its anti-inflammatory and relaxant properties. This herbal tea contains valerenic acid, isovaleric acid, and valerenol, which have been shown to reduce muscle spasms and calm the nervous system. When consumed, these compounds can help reduce inflammation in the neck muscles, leading to relief from pain and stiffness.
